title: Welcome!
body: Welcome to the Math and Physics Hallway! This is a sample announcement. Edit slides.json to change content.

title: 🎉 Upcoming Event
body: The Astronomy Public Lecture Series will return on March 28th at 7:30pm with a guest lecture from Dr. Wes Ryle!

name: Austin Hinkel, Ph.D.
title: Assistant Professor of Phyiscs
bio: Dr. Hinkel's research focuses on Galactic Archaeology. He joined TMU in 2023 after a short stint at Colorado College.

title: 📢 Reminder
body: Theta is the polar angle, not azimuthal!!!
